rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped literature citation in the WOM background section alongside several other studies documenting WOM effects on outcomes. In the citing paper, it is used as broad prior-work context rather than being discussed for a specific finding, mechanism, model component, or measure that the authors build on. There is no distinct, paper-specific role for Villanueva et al. (2008) in the hypotheses, modeling choices, or interpretation of results.
